mapper.select: select id, username, password, real_name, role, status from sys_user where username = #{username} limit 1
select id, username, password, real_name, role, status from sys_user where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user (username, password, real_name, role, status) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{role}, #{status})
